lessons: ALWAYS submit the exact live API command with all required numeric parameters from the current screen; DO NOT use card names, omit target_index for targeted cards, or output any non-executable format.

ALWAYS, when the screen shows exactly one playable meaningful card, submit that exact live API command with every required numeric parameter immediately (including target_index if needed); DO NOT output anything non-executable, omit parameters, or choose end_turn while that card remains playable.

ALWAYS verify that the exact action is both listed and currently valid for a live selectable index on the screen, and when using discard_potion, include the correct discardable option_index from the current state; DO NOT guess, omit parameters, or target a non-discardable potion.
ALWAYS submit select_deck_card with the exact numeric option_index from the current CARD_SELECTION screen; DO NOT omit required parameters or send a bare action name.

ALWAYS submit exactly one action that is explicitly listed and supported on the current screen in its exact live API syntax; DO NOT assume a standard command like end_turn() is executable unless the live interface actually accepts it.

ALWAYS use the exact live executable action syntax the interface accepts for the current screen, and DO NOT assume a standard wrapper like end_turn() is valid just because the action name appears in Available Action Names.
ALWAYS submit exactly one action in the exact live API executable syntax shown for the current screen, including parentheses (for example, `continue_run()`), and DO NOT send bare action names.

ALWAYS submit exactly one action in the exact live API executable syntax shown for the current screen, including all required parentheses and parameters, and DO NOT attempt a listed action unless its exact executable form is valid in the current live state.
DO NOT execute an action just because its name appears in Available Action Names; ALWAYS verify that the exact command is currently supported by the live API before submitting it.

DO NOT convert an Available Action Name into a parenthesized executable command unless the live interface explicitly confirms that exact syntax is supported; ALWAYS verify the exact currently accepted live command before submitting any MAIN_MENU action.
